title: meryta angustifolia
intro: Meryta angustifolia, also known as the Kanlaong plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae, native to the tropical forests of Hawaii and other Pacific Islands. It has been used in traditional Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Meryta angustifolia include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and protect against infections. Meryta angustifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and salves, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
